latest_released_app_version.description: Latest released app version (semver, e.g. 1.2.3). The app shows the update dialog when the installed version is lower than this value.

defaultValue.value:
A new version of Flutter Starter is available with improvements and bug fixes.

  • Performance improvements
  • Bug fixes
  • New features

update_message.description: HTML body shown inside the update popup. Supports basic HTML tags (p, b, i, ul, li, h3, br, etc.).

enabled_on_ios.description: When false, the update popup is suppressed for iOS devices regardless of version. Use as a per-platform kill switch.

enabled_on_android.description: When false, the update popup is suppressed for Android devices regardless of version. Use as a per-platform kill switch.

force_update.description: When true, the dialog blocks the app: only the 'Update now' button is shown; the user cannot dismiss it via barrier tap, back button, or 'Remind me later' / 'Ignore'. Any previously stored 'ignored' version is bypassed.
